query:
SELECT ac.microInicio, ac.microTermino, COUNT(*) as cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT ap.alunoId) as alunos
FROM assessment_competencias ac
JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id
JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id
WHERE t.name LIKE '%Vis%'
GROUP BY ac.microInicio, ac.microTermino
ORDER BY ac.microInicio;

JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id
